articles.content: BEIRUT -- BEIRUT (AP) Lebanon's president will meet with U.S. President Donald Trump on Tuesday to wrap up a four-day visit to Washington, in a bid to bring about long-term calm in the war-torn count…

articles.title: ‘Critic to Israel’: Document reveals how Israel scrutinised global NGOs
articles.excerpt: An internal government file obtained by Al Jazeera shows how Israel collected data on groups it suspected supported BDS.
articles.content: An official document obtained by Al Jazeera shows how Israel collected information on charities in 2013, singling out some of the worlds most well-known humanitarian organisations for their perceived…

articles.title: Venezuela earthquakes death toll rises to 5,278
articles.excerpt: Official figures confirm 5,278 people died in Venezuela's dual earthquakes last month.  The powerful tremors significantly impacted the nation's northern coastal regions and near the capital.  Over 16,700 individuals sustained injuries from the devastating se…

articles.title: IRGC destroys US radar, strikes bases in Kuwait amid rising tensions
articles.excerpt:
IRGC strikes US radar and bases in Kuwait, signaling escalation. Military action against a Gulf state on July 22 at 51% YES.
